mechanism_narrative: Persistent consumer price inflation erodes real equity returns via discount rate effects and margin compression, producing negative SPX forward returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: 20d forward return > 0 in more than 60% of months when CPIAUCSL y/y > 3%.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate above a threshold of 0.50% signals the beginning of a monetary tightening cycle that increases discount rates and reduces equity valuations, leading to negative quarterly forward returns.
failure_condition: If 60d forward returns are positive in more than 50% of instances after FEDFUNDS crosses 0.50%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent positive growth in industrial production and payroll employment signals robust aggregate demand and productivity, boosting corporate earnings and SPX forward returns over one month.
failure_condition: If the joint signal of rising INDPRO and PAYEMS produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts exceed 1.6 million units per month, the construction sector signals overheating and forward equity returns turn negative as input costs and interest rate sensitivity rise.
failure_condition: If 5d forward returns are positive in more than half of instances when HOUST > 1600.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly retail sales (RSAFS) surging above 1% month-over-month growth indicates robust consumption that justifies positive short-term equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: If the five-day forward return is negative in more than 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: When both the federal funds rate is below 2% and unemployment is below 4%, the economy is in a late-cycle overheating phase where further expansion compresses profit margins and leads to negative quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: If average 60d forward return is positive in instances where FEDFUNDS<2 and UNRATE<4.

mechanism_narrative: During high inflation regimes (CPIAUCSL index > 280), increases in industrial production exacerbate supply-side bottlenecks and commodity price pressures, leading to negative SPX returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: If 20d forward returns are positive in more than 40% of months when CPIAUCSL>280 and INDPRO rising.

mechanism_narrative: Persistently low unemployment below 4% signals a tight labor market that drives up wage costs and reduces corporate profitability, generating negative forward equity returns over a weekly horizon.
failure_condition: If 5d forward returns are positive in more than half of weeks when UNRATE is below 4%.
